The report on living conditions and lifestyle reveals the following parameters: for Log-likelihood, the intercept only is
represented by Weighted model (A) at −2258.415, Unweighted model (B) at −2266.742, with a Difference (A–B) of 8.327; Full
model shows Weighted model (A) at −2227.716, Unweighted model (B) at −2230.964, and a Difference (A–B) of 3.248. AIC
presents Weighted model (A) at 8.546, Unweighted model (B) at 8.559, with a Difference (A–B) of −0.012; BIC shows
Weighted model (A) at 1285.189, Unweighted model (B) at 1291.686, and a Difference (A–B) of −6.497. In Social
relationships, the intercept only is Weighted model (A) at −2174.316, Unweighted model (B) at −2230.414, with a Difference
(A–B) of 56.099; Full model is Weighted model (A) at −2148.154, Unweighted model (B) at −2204.064, with a Difference (A–
B) of 55.91. AIC is 8.244 for Weighted model (A) and 8.457 for Unweighted model (B); BIC is 1126.066 and 1237.886
respectively. Personal independence lists the intercept only as Weighted model (A) at −2220.829, Unweighted model (B) at
−2360.524, Difference (A–B) at 139.695; Full model at Weighted model (A) −2202.666, Unweighted model (B) −2333.997,

Difference (A–B) 131.332; AIC is 8.451 and 8.951; BIC is 1235.089 and 1497.752. 

The data from Table 2 categorizes objects
as follows: Topographic map is linked to vtkDelaunay2D with a data file structure consisting of Line 1: 1 (Classification code),
Line 2: Unused, Line 3: Unused, Line 4: (x, y, z) of point 1, Line 5: (x, y, z) of point 2; Drift or shaft is associated with
vtkLineSourcevtkTubeFilter, featuring Line 1: 2 (Classification code), Line 2: Radius of tube, Line 3: Unused, Line 4: (x, y, z)
of start point 1 / end point 1, Line 5: (x, y, z) of start point 2 / end point 2; Borehole uses vtkLineSourcevtkTubeFilter with Line
1: 3 (Classification code), Line 2: Radius of tube, Line 3: Number of class, Line 4: (x, y, z) of point 1 / label / class, Line 5: (x,
y, z) of point 2 / label / class; Goaf is linked to vtkPolygonvtkLinearExtrusionFilter, with Line 1: 4 (Classification code), Line 2:
Extrusion length, Line 3: Unused, Line 4: (x, y, z) of point 1 / polygon number, Line 5: (x, y, z) of point 2 / polygon number;
Groundwater level is associated with vtkCylinderSource, comprising Line 1: 5 (Classification code), Line 2: Number of ponds,
Line 3: Radius of each pond, Line 4: Number of time steps, Line 5: Pond number / time step / (x, y, z) of water level.
